records.question: What addresses in the USA have the building number and street exactly as 9260 Streich Mountain?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.line_1_number_building = '9260 Streich Mountain'
records.pred_sql: SELECT address_id FROM Addresses WHERE country = 'USA' AND line_1_number_building = '9260 Streich Mountain'

records.question: Where are the addresses located in Ericamouth that belong to staff born on or before 2007-06-11 20:03:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Ericamouth' AND staff.date_of_birth <= '2007-06-11 20:03:28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
INNER JOIN Staff s ON a.address_id = s.staff_address_id
WHERE a.city = 'Ericamouth'
AND s.date_of_birth <= '2007-06-11 20:03:28'

records.question: What addresses in Ericamouth, Louisiana with zip code 75074 belong to customers named Bernhard who became customers on 2016-05-11 17:03:48, have the email everette.goyette@example.org, phone number 07278206718, and a status of Bad Customer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Ericamouth' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Louisiana' AND addresses.zip_postcode = '75074' AND customers.date_became_customer = '2016-05-11 17:03:48' AND customers.email_address = 'everette.goyette@example.org' AND customers.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer' AND customers.phone_number = '07278206718' AND customers.last_name = 'Bernhard'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
INNER JOIN Customers c ON a.address_id = c.customer_address_id
WHERE a.city = 'Ericamouth'
AND a.state_province_county = 'Louisiana'
AND a.zip_postcode = '75074'
AND c.date_became_customer = '2016-05-11 17:03:48'
AND c.email_address = 'everette.goyette@example.org'
AND c.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer'
AND c.phone_number = '07278206718'
AND c.last_name = 'Bernhard'

records.question: Which addresses in Port Jackelinemouth with zip postcode 85954 belong to customers whose amount outstanding is exactly 3900.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.amount_outstanding = 3900.0 AND addresses.zip_postcode = '85954' AND addresses.city = 'Port Jackelinemouth'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
INNER JOIN Customers c ON a.address_id = c.customer_address_id
WHERE a.zip_postcode = '85954'
AND a.city = 'Port Jackelinemouth'
AND c.amount_outstanding = 3900.0

records.question: Which addresses belong to customers named Dameon who are Bad Customers born on or after 1996-08-30 06:17:50, with an outstanding amount of 9332.0 and became customers on or before 2015-09-25 13:59:21, while the associated staff left exactly on 2018-02-26 17:56:31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer' AND customers.date_of_birth >= '1996-08-30 06:17:50' AND customers.first_name = 'Dameon' AND staff.date_left_staff = '2018-02-26 17:56:31' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2015-09-25 13:59:21' AND customers.amount_outstanding = 9332.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Staff s
  WHERE s.staff_address_id = a.address_id
  AND s.date_left_staff = '2018-02-26 17:56:31'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Customers c
  WHERE c.customer_address_id = a.address_id
  AND c.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer'
  AND c.date_of_birth >= '1996-08-30 06:17:50'
  AND c.first_name = 'Dameon'
  AND c.date_became_customer <= '2015-09-25 13:59:21'
  AND c.amount_outstanding = 9332.0
)

records.question: What addresses are linked to staff whose middle name is Duane and who left on 2018-03-05 18:30:12, also associated with customers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE staff.date_left_staff = '2018-03-05 18:30:12' AND staff.middle_name = 'Duane'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Staff s
  WHERE s.staff_address_id = a.address_id
  AND s.date_left_staff = '2018-03-05 18:30:12'
  AND s.middle_name = 'Duane'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Customers c
  WHERE c.customer_address_id = a.address_id
)

records.question: Which addresses in Port Melyssa are linked to staff where the last name is Mraz and to customers who became customers exactly on 2015-09-25 13:59:21?

SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.date_became_customer = '2015-09-25 13:59:21' AND staff.last_name = 'Mraz' AND addresses.city = 'Port Melyssa'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.address_id
FROM Addresses a
WHERE a.city = 'Port Melyssa'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Staff s
  WHERE s.staff_address_id = a.address_id
  AND s.last_name = 'Mraz'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM Customers c
  WHERE c.customer_address_id = a.address_id
  AND c.date_became_customer = '2015-09-25 13:59:21'
)
